heading: Repealed. ,June 22, 1948, ch. 605, § 362 Stat. 576
label: 230 to 233 Repealed. ,June 22, 1948, ch. 605, § 362 Stat. 576
notes: Section 230, , , authorized permits and leases for certain United States citizens and corporations in Oklahoma.act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 249, § 142 Stat. 1448
Section 231, , , required applications for permits and leases to be made not later than sixty days after .act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 249, § 242 Stat. 1448Mar. 4, 1923
Section 232, , , limited amount of land any one person or corporation could be granted.act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 249, § 342 Stat. 1448
Section 233, , , provided for payment of royalties to United States.act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 249, § 442 Stat. 1448
Savings Provision, , provided that the repeal of these sections is subject to existing valid rights.Act June 22, 1948, ch. 605, § 362 Stat. 576
